facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda sits on Nguyễn Trung Trực and almost nobody on a resort itinerary finds it. Real incense. Real worshippers. Zero crowds. 4.5 stars from 71 reviews, most of them locals. Phu Quoc has beaches on every list. This is the side the lists skip. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Incense rising, monks moving, no tour group in sight. Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda is the Phu Quoc stop most visitors never make. 4.5 stars, 71 reviews, zero hype. Go early.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about this. Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda, 4.5 stars, and barely any tourists. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Incense smoke, quiet courtyards, no crowds. Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda hits different at 7am.

tiktok.caption: The Phu Quoc stop tourists keep skipping. Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda. 4.5 stars. Go early. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #PhuQuocTips

scenes: Exterior gate of Hung Quoc Tu Pagoda, empty street
